name: Frankfurter Casserole (Hot Dog or Hotdog)
recipeIngredient: 2 All-beef frankfurters (or chicken or turkey franks), cut into 1/2-inch pieces
1 cup Ready-mix biscuit mixture, prepared as package directs
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 375°F.
2. Mix all ingredients except biscuits in a bowl.
3. Boil gently for 5 minutes.
4. Pour about 3/4 cup of the mixture into each of 8 individual baking dishes; top each with a biscuit.
- (Note: You could also try using one baking dish.)
5. Bake until the biscuits are dark golden brown, about 20 minutes.
6. Serve immediately.
Note: 5 oz before cooking = 3 1/2 to 4 oz servings.
Food Exchange per serving: 1 BREAD/STARCH EXCHANGE + 1/2 HIGH-FAT MEAT EXCHANGE + 1/2 FAT EXCHANGE + 1/2 VEGETABLE EXCHANGE CAL: 150
